productName: Nano Doozies - Watermelon Kiwi 3:1 FLY10 Pk (80g) (300mg CBG;100mg THC)
description: An artisan sweet, refreshing watermelon gummy made like a tiny gourmet dessert — tender, juicy, and finished with the kind of sweet-sour sparkle that keeps you reaching for the next piece. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift and CBG to support daytime focus and clarity in a 3:1 ratio. For an uplifting, energetic experience.
